Residual matrix to diagnose for a VAR-LiNGAM model

Source: R/lingam_var_diagnostics.r
compute_varlingam_residuals.Rd

Returns the series targeted by the residual diagnostics: either the LiNGAM innovations e_t = (I - B0) n_t (the independent errors) or the reduced-form VAR residuals n_t. Shared by the normality tests and the QQ plot.

Usage

compute_varlingam_residuals(result, on = c("innovations", "var"))

Arguments

result

a VARLiNGAMResult

on

"innovations" or "var"

Value

residual matrix (n_obs x n_features), column names preserved
